nodes.description: Create agents/test-debt-classifier.md (5-category classifier; declared allowlist for pytest+bash test.sh+git log; ≤2K-token output cap; multi-classification tiebreak; zero-failures behavior; explicit timeout-parameter on every Bash invocation; partial-output-on-timeout handling; textual false-pass scan; INLINE per-runner exit-code table for pytest + bash test.sh — folded from former WU13)
Create hooks/prism-bash-allowlist.sh (substring-prefix match; case-statement on agent_type; scope-guardrail framing)

Implement test runner detection in prism.md — 2-runner check (pytest config OR test.sh; both → SAIL_PRISM_TEST_RUNNER or polyglot_ambiguous_no_override); command -v precheck for binary-missing; validate SAIL_PRISM_TEST_RUNNER against v1 set
Wire Stage 5.5 in prism.md (conditional; spawns test-debt-classifier subagent; receives summarized findings; persists raw output; default-construct test_debt field on absent state)
Update Synthesis stage — consume test-debt findings as themable contributor; document theme-flattening; surface skip_reason from closed enum
Update prism wizard state schema — add test_debt step; document closed skip_reason enum; consumer-side default-construct on absent field
Update settings-example.json — add prism-bash-allowlist.sh to PreToolUse Bash matcher
Update test.sh — Cat 3-8 coverage (consolidated AC1 covers existence checks); cover AC1-AC22; AC11 fixture-driven word-count check uses WU13 fixture
Add 7 behavioral eval fixtures to evals/evals.json (allowed, blocked, main-session, different-agent, binary-missing→runner_binary_missing, false-pass textual, unsupported_override)
Refresh metadata — install.sh agent count 12→13 + hook count 18→19; README.md, agents/README.md, .claude/CLAUDE.md (hook count 19→20 shell files)
Pre-impl empirical gate — verify the NEW prism-bash-allowlist.sh hook fires for actual test-debt-classifier subagent dispatch (distinct from AC10 general claim)

Create test fixture for AC11 — tests/fixtures/test-debt-100-failures/ with 100 synthetic failing tests + generate.sh for deterministic recreation. Used to verify subagent return-message ≤ 2K-token bound
User-facing threat-model documentation — Security & Side Effects subsection in commands/prism.md; install.sh first-run message; one-line per-stage runner-naming warning

file_conflicts.note: Six WUs touch prism.md — naturally serialized by dependency graph
